name: I Traveled To All 7 Continents With No Money
original_name: I Traveled To All 7 Continents With No Money
overview: Reuben Schmitz and his friend Pim attempt the ultimate budget travel challenge—visiting all seven continents with no money. Relying on creativity, resourcefulness, and the kindness of strangers, they hitchhike, barter, and hustle their way around the world in this thrilling adventure series.

trailers.title: I Traveled To All 7 Continents With No Money - Trailer
